items.title: CogniRoute: Learning to Route Social Evidence in Omni-Modal Models
items.abstract: Omni-modal models can ingest video, audio, and text, but unified access to multiple modalities does not guarantee that a model uses the right evidence. This gap is especially pronounced in social vide
